context: Tests whether the agent correctly executes Phase 1 by extracting functional requirements, all four NFR categories, constraints, and risks from a PRD — and correctly updates state.json to mark requirements as accepted while avoiding premature technology or design decisions.

checklist.name: Functional requirements
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md contains a section documenting functional requirements extracted from the PRD

checklist.name: Availability NFR
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md explicitly captures an availability or uptime non-functional requirement

checklist.name: Security NFR
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md explicitly captures a security non-functional requirement

checklist.name: Cost NFR
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md explicitly captures a cost or budget non-functional requirement

checklist.name: Monitoring NFR
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md explicitly captures a monitoring or observability non-functional requirement

checklist.name: Constraints identified
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md contains a section or list of project or technical constraints

checklist.name: Risks identified
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md contains a section or list of identified risks

checklist.name: No technology recommendations
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md does NOT recommend or name specific technologies, frameworks, or databases

checklist.name: No component design details
checklist.description: phase1-evaluation.md does NOT describe component structures, API shapes, or architecture patterns
